title: Liberty (disambiguation)
content:
'''''Liberty''''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Liberty]]''''', an [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser|MC80 ''Liberty'' Type Heavy Star Cruiser]]
*'''[[Liberty (Venator-class)|''Liberty'']]''', a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Starships===
*'''[[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']]''', an [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]]
*'''[[Liberty (Majestic-class)|''Liberty'']]''', a [[Majestic-class heavy cruiser|''Majestic''-class heavy cruiser]]
*'''[[Liberty (Venator-class)/Legends|''Liberty'']]''', a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]]
*'''[[Liberty (Yevetha)|''Liberty'']]''', a [[Yevetha]]n [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]]
*'''''[[Liberty Gambler]]''''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]]
*'''''[[Liberty Star]]''''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Assault Frigate Mark I|Assault Frigate]]
*'''''[[Swift Liberty]]''''', a New Republic [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]]

===Other===
*"'''[[Liberty Road]]'''", a song by [[Starburst]]
*The '''[[Medal of Liberty]]''', an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] medal

==See also==
*''[[Liberator (disambiguation)|Liberator]]'', the name of many other ships
